description_long: This object is a classic steam locomotive with a cylindrical black boiler at the front, a prominent smokestack, and a metallic red body extending to the cab. The locomotive features six large spoked wheels on each side, with a smaller leading wheel at the front. The cab is boxy and enclosed, painted in a deep red color, and sits at the rear of the engine. The front of the train has a circular face with a central headlamp and a cowcatcher at the base. The surface of the train is glossy, reflecting light and giving it a polished metallic appearance. There are no visible doors or windows on the cab, and the train appears to be a single engine unit without additional carriages.
description: A glossy, metallic red and black steam locomotive with large spoked wheels, a cylindrical boiler, and an enclosed cab at the rear. The train has a polished finish and classic steam engine features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular face, central headlamp, and cowcatcher beneath the cylindrical black boiler.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the locomotive, six large spoked wheels, and the transition from the black boiler to the red cab.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the boxy, deep red cab and the back of the train with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the wheels, boiler, and cab from the other side.
